_description: Pipeline configuration for year extraction. Thresholds, trust levels, and rules.

master_year_fields.release_year: NJ launch year (from Eilers CSV). Integer. All 4550 games have this.
master_year_fields.release_month: NJ launch month (from Eilers CSV). Integer 1-12.
master_year_fields.original_release_year: Global online release year. Integer. This is what we're trying to fill.
master_year_fields.original_release_month: Global online release month. Integer 1-12. Set when full date available.
master_year_fields.original_release_date: Global online release date. ISO string 'yyyy-mm-dd'. Set when full date available.
master_year_fields.original_release_date_source: Source that provided the global year. String.
master_year_fields.original_release_confidence: Pipeline confidence 1-5. NOT currently in master — written by --apply.
master_year_fields.extraction_date: Date the game was processed by extract_game_profile.py.
master_year_fields.gt_applied_date: Date AGS GT was applied (if AGS game).
